data.title: Kickstarter and Creator Camp collaborate to sponsor wide theatrical release of film Two Sleepy People, advocating for community-backed cinema.
data.description: A crowdfunded campaign by Kickstarter has enabled the widespread theatrical debut of the film "Two Sleepy People" in Austin, Texas. This initiative showcases the power of community-supported cinema projects. The campaign, held in January 2026, was a collaboration between Kickstarter, a prominent crowdfunding platform, and Creator Camp, a filmmaker-led studio. This partnership has emphasized the potential for creative ventures of various scales to succeed with the backing of the community.

data.title: Cryptocurrencies rally as Trump withdraws Greenland tariff threat with Bitcoin +1.32% at $90,068.10, Ethereum +1.99% at $3,019.96, XRP +2.98% at $1.96, Dogecoin +1.77% at $0.1274. Market sees over $630 million liquidated in the last 24 hours.
data.description: Cryptocurrencies surged as stocks rose following President Trump's tariff reversal on Europe. Bitcoin increased by 1.32% to $90,068.10, Ethereum by 1.99% to $3,019.96, XRP by 2.98% to $1.96, Solana by 2.42% to $130.47, and Dogecoin by 1.77% to $0.1274. Bitcoin broke its week-long losing streak, crossing $90,000, while Ethereum passed $3,000 amidst the market's uptick. Over $630 million was liquidated in the past 24 hours, evenly clearing leveraged long and short positions. Notably, Bitcoin's open interest decreased by 0.35% recently. Stocks of related companies like Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ: MSTR) and Bitmine Immersion Technologies Inc. (NYSE: BMNR) closed up 2.23% and 3.93%, respectively.

data.title: Erasca upsizes public offering to 22.5M shares at $10/share, expecting gross proceeds of $225M. Underwriters have 30-day option for 3.37M more shares.
data.description: Erasca, Inc. (Nasdaq: ERAS), a company specializing in precision oncology for RAS/MAPK pathway-driven cancers, announced the pricing of an increased public offering of 22,500,000 shares of its common stock at $10.00 per share. The total gross proceeds are anticipated to be $225.0 million before deductions. Additionally, Erasca has given the underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to 3,375,000 more shares at the offering price. The closing of the offering is set for January 23, 2026, pending standard closing conditions.

data.title: GAC reveals AION V, M8 PHEV, EMZOOM in Australia; 'GAC: Growing Australian Confidence' strategy launched.
data.description: GAC conducted a brand and new model launch event in Sydney on November 18, 2025, introducing its Australia Local Strategy called "GAC: Growing Australian Confidence." This strategy is a localized version of the company's global "One GAC 2.0" strategy. The event marked a significant step in GAC's expansion efforts in Australia, showcasing its commitment to the market.

data.title: Kioxia Corp. selected as Top 100 Global Innovators 2026 by Clarivate Plc. 5th time receiving award for IP achievements.
data.description: In Tokyo, Kioxia Corporation has been recognized as a Clarivate Top 100 Global Innovator for 2026. This prestigious award, presented by Clarivate Plc, signifies Kioxia's outstanding achievements in intellectual property and innovation. This marks the fifth time Kioxia has received this esteemed honor. The Clarivate Top 100 Global Innovators 2026 Awards highlight the top innovative companies worldwide, determined through Clarivate's analysis of intellectual property. Kioxia's consistent acknowledgment showcases its commitment to driving innovation.

data.title: Correction: Aleria, Tawasal, and Xange.com collaborate to scale Paris Agreement market infrastructure, targeting over $100B in ITMOs pipeline.
data.description: Aleria, Tawasal, and Xange.com have collaborated to expand the Paris Agreement Market Infrastructure and increase the ITMOs pipeline to over $100 billion. The partnership aims to boost sustainable investments and support climate initiatives on a larger scale. This joint effort, announced on 21-Jan-2026, reflects a significant step towards achieving the goals set forth in the Paris Agreement. Through this venture, the companies are set to make substantial strides in the realm of environmental impact and sustainable finance by facilitating a massive pipeline worth over $100 billion in ITMOs.
